introSection: Bullet Coaster is an S&S launched roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Shenzhen, Guangdong, China.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Bullet Coaster was set to open in 2011, but the opening was delayed to 2012.

The ride was closed from November 2012 to 1 July 2013.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 6 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 24 riders per train.

sections.title: Incidents
sections.content: October 27, 2023, a train on Bullet Coaster rolled back on the top hat, and collided with another train in the station.

fullText:
Bullet Coaster is an S&S launched roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Shenzhen, Guangdong, China.

Bullet Coaster was set to open in 2011, but the opening was delayed to 2012.

The ride was closed from November 2012 to 1 July 2013.



6 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 24 riders per train.

October 27, 2023, a train on Bullet Coaster rolled back on the top hat, and collided with another train in the station.
